description: Signal/status active-phase hints, provider/profile stale threshold settings, stale detection, incident playbooks, synthetic fixtures, and rollout safety checks for Pibo debug telemetry.

userStories.title: Expose compact active telemetry hints in status or signals
userStories.description: As an operator, I want live status to show active phase and stale age hints so that I know whether to inspect telemetry.
acceptanceCriteria: Add active phase, last progress timestamp, stale age, active turn id, and queue depth to the appropriate session status or signal projection when telemetry is available
Signal/status payloads do not include raw provider events, bounded previews, headers, transcripts, normalized event payloads, or full tool arguments
If telemetry is unavailable, status output remains backward-compatible and does not fail
Tests cover active non-stale, active stale, and telemetry-unavailable cases
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in signals/staleness batch on 2026-05-16: signal snapshots now expose compact metadata-only activeTelemetry hints with active turn id, active phase, last progress time, stale age, stale flag, queue depth, and threshold. Tests cover active non-stale, active stale, telemetry-unavailable/idle, and absence of prompt/tool argument payloads. Validated with Docker npm run typecheck and npm test (429 passing tests).

userStories.title: Add provider/profile stale threshold settings
userStories.description: As an operator, I want minimal provider/profile stale threshold config so long-running providers are not judged by one global timeout.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a minimal Provider Settings config option for telemetry stale threshold per provider/profile
Config supports a safe default and provider/profile overrides without requiring a Chat Web telemetry UI in V1
Settings read path returns the applied threshold and threshold source for stale/status output
Tests cover default threshold, provider/profile override, invalid config fallback, and missing config fallback
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in signals/staleness batch on 2026-05-16: added sanitized telemetryStaleThresholds user/provider settings shape with default, provider, and profile thresholds plus resolver output for applied threshold and source. Tests cover default, provider override, profile override, explicit override, invalid config fallback, and missing config fallback. Validated with Docker npm run typecheck and npm test (429 passing tests).

userStories.title: Implement provider-aware stale work detector service
userStories.description: As an agent, I want a stale detector over telemetry so that I can find stuck active work without mutating sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement a stale detector that reads telemetry open phases and active work state using provider/profile-aware thresholds
Detector results include piboSessionId, turnId, phase, staleForMs, lastProgressAt, queue depth when known, applied threshold, threshold source, and next command metadata
Detector never calls abort, clear, dispose, prune, or any mutating session operation
Tests cover below-threshold active work, above-threshold stale work, missing lastProgressAt, provider/profile override, and completed turns
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in signals/staleness batch on 2026-05-16: added read-only TelemetryStaleDetector over existing telemetry read APIs with provider/profile-aware thresholds, threshold source/key output, next commands, active phase, stale age, queue depth, provider/model/profile fields, missing-progress fallback, and completed-turn filtering. Detector performs no abort/clear/dispose/prune mutations. Validated with Docker npm run typecheck and npm test (429 passing tests).

userStories.title: Add core telemetry fixture builders for CLI and service tests
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want reusable normal and partial-toolcall fixtures so command behavior can be tested without live provider calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Add fixture helpers that create a normal completed assistant turn and a partial tool-call/stuck turn
Fixtures populate correlated session, turn, phase, provider request, provider event metadata/aggregate, and tool-call records
Fixtures include stale-capable timestamps and existing session/event/payload links without copying full content bodies
Fixture tests prove each fixture can be inserted and queried through the telemetry service
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Builds on PRD 03 incident fixture where available.
validation: docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck'

docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-telemetry-validation-build.log 2>&1 && node --test test/telemetry-validation-fixtures.test.mjs test/telemetry-stuck-tool-call-fixture.test.mjs test/debug-cli.test.mjs' (22 passing tests)
docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck && npm test' (437 passing tests)

userStories.title: Add provider error and no-telemetry fixtures
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want malformed-provider, unknown-event, stale-tool, and no-telemetry fixtures for negative-path validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add fixtures for malformed provider JSON, unknown provider event, stale tool execution, no telemetry available, and preview disabled/unavailable
Fixtures use fake large payloads/tool arguments for bounded-output/storage tests and never require real credentials
Fixture tests prove each fixture can be inserted and queried or produces the expected no-telemetry diagnostic
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Do not add raw preview fixtures unless preview mode is explicitly enabled.
validation: docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck'

docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-telemetry-validation-build.log 2>&1 && node --test test/telemetry-validation-fixtures.test.mjs test/telemetry-stuck-tool-call-fixture.test.mjs test/debug-cli.test.mjs' (22 passing tests)
docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck && npm test' (437 passing tests)

userStories.title: Validate agent drill-down path from session id
userStories.description: As an AI operator, I want an automated check that the telemetry CLI can diagnose a stuck session in a small number of bounded commands.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a test or scripted fixture that starts with only a piboSessionId from the partial tool-call fixture
Verify the drill-down path reaches the active stale phase using no more than session, turn, provider, and tool command outputs
Verify each command output includes the ids needed for the next command in text and JSON mode
Verify default outputs are bounded and report truncation/aggregation where applicable
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on PRD 04 core commands and US-004 fixtures.
validation: docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck'

docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck && npm test' (437 passing tests)

userStories.title: Validate bounded output for telemetry commands
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want tests proving default telemetry outputs do not print large content bodies.
acceptanceCriteria: Seed telemetry fixtures with large provider payloads, large tool arguments, header-like metadata, and existing session/event payload links
Verify sessions, session, turn, provider, provider events, tool, stale, and stats default outputs do not contain full payload bodies or full tool arguments
Verify JSON outputs include limit/truncation/cursor metadata where applicable
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck && npm test' (437 passing tests)

userStories.title: Validate storage non-duplication and preview-unavailable behavior
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want tests proving telemetry links to existing content instead of duplicating it.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify telemetry rows link to existing session/event/payload evidence instead of duplicating full normalized event payloads
Verify default preview reads return unavailable/disabled metadata and do not read arbitrary raw provider payloads
If preview mode is explicitly enabled later, verify preview output contains bounded preview/truncation metadata and no full payload bodies by default
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on PRD 02 store contract and optional PRD 04 preview command if present.

userStories.title: Write telemetry incident-debug playbooks
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want repeatable playbooks so future incidents are debugged safely and consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add documentation for stuck streaming session, partial tool-call args, provider parse error, unknown provider event, stale tool execution, preview unavailable, and telemetry retention cleanup
Each playbook starts with bounded summary commands before any optional bounded preview command
Playbooks include JSON-mode examples for agents and text-mode examples for humans
Prune playbook shows dry-run before apply and warns about destructive behavior
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by docs/project/observability-telemetry-playbooks.md and linked capability examples.
validation: docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck'
docker exec pibo-dev-ralph-observability-telemetry bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' (438 passing tests)

userStories.title: Add final observability rollout verification task
userStories.description: As an engineering lead, I want one final verification checklist so the telemetry feature is complete before production use.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a documented final verification checklist covering npm run typecheck, relevant tests, synthetic stuck-session drill-down, bounded-output/storage safety, stats, prune dry-run, stale threshold-source output, preview-unavailable behavior, and backward compatibility for existing debug commands
Checklist references the PRD files and source specs for traceability
Checklist states that automatic timeout/recovery work is separate from telemetry observability
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by docs/project/observability-telemetry-rollout-verification.md and linked PRD checklist references.
